event: medically and surgically free until 8 days before presentation
severe stabbing pain in paraumbilical region
uterus slightly bulky without gross mural defects
air-fluid level in bilateral paracolic gutters and right perihepatic region
conservative treatment (NPO, broad-spectrum antibiotics, prophylactic PPI)
follow-up CT scan with oral contrast
0.5 cm mural defect in anterior wall of first part of duodenum
extravasation of oral contrast into right perihepatic region
surgical exploration and repair with omental patch
improvement with residual mild tachycardia and tachypnea
